title: opskarta v3 merged plan
description: Schema for merged plan (result of merging multiple fragments) in opskarta v3.

version.description: Plan format version, must be 3 for v3. Required in merged plan.

statuses.description: Dictionary of status_id -> status definition (merged from all fragments)

nodes.description: Dictionary of node_id -> node definition (merged from all fragments)

views.description: Dictionary of view_id -> view definition (merged from all fragments)

profiles.description: List of extension profile declarations (merged from all fragments)

x.description: Extension data (arbitrary key-value pairs, merged from all fragments)

sources.description: Metadata tracking which file contributed each element. Format: 'type:id' -> 'file_path'. Example: 'node:task1' -> 'nodes.plan.yaml'
